asia.title: Why the US-Iran deal may fail to revive shipping through the Strait of Hormuz
asia.summary: As US President Donald Trump moves to reopen the Strait of Hormuz through a peace deal with Iran, major shipping companies such as Maersk are likely to stop short of resuming normal operations in the near term amid lingering concerns about the waterway’s security and the durability of the agreement, according to observers.
